name: Draining Flourish
descrip: Deeply kiss your opponent. Can charm them.
outcome: With a hungry, lustful purr, [AttackerName] deepens the kiss while an ominous glow wreathes her body, the succubus greedily indulging in [TargetName]'s energy amid the saliva-swapping gulps and tongue-entangling smooching, all the while her spaded tail's tip toyingly rubs up and down [TargetHisOrHer] twitching shaft in a temptingly slow caress.
miss: With a hungry, lustful purr, [AttackerName] deepens the kiss while an ominous glow wreathes her body, but [TargetName] manages to resist the draining smooching!
statusOutcome: [TargetName] can feel [TargetHimOrHer]self go literally weak in the knees as each and every draining pulse leeches [TargetHisOrHer] energy, until [TargetHisOrHer] whole body feels delightfully soft and pliably helpless amid [AttackerName]' tail's constant stroking.
